description: Neon provides a managed Postgres platform with branching, serverless compute, and related backend services such as a Data API, object storage, functions, auth, and AI tooling. It is used to build and operate application backends and agent workflows on top of Postgres.
summary: Neon exposes a REST management API, a branch-scoped Data API, a hosted MCP server, and an npm-installed CLI; the documented reusable developer credential is a Neon API key, while Data API request auth is documented but not fully resolved from the scraped pages.
